A

ApiGatewayApplication - Class in com.hotelreservation.gateway
API Gateway — single entry point for all microservices.
ApiGatewayApplication() - Constructor for class com.hotelreservation.gateway.ApiGatewayApplication
 
apply(AuthenticationFilter.Config) - Method in class com.hotelreservation.gateway.filter.AuthenticationFilter
Builds and returns the reactive GatewayFilter logic for this factory.
AuthenticationFilter - Class in com.hotelreservation.gateway.filter
API Gateway filter that enforces JWT authentication on protected routes and forwards user context headers to downstream microservices.
AuthenticationFilter() - Constructor for class com.hotelreservation.gateway.filter.AuthenticationFilter
Constructs the filter and registers it with the gateway filter factory.
AuthenticationFilter.Config - Class in com.hotelreservation.gateway.filter
